title: I will revenge this world with Love - S. Paradjanov
original_title: "I Will Revenge This World With Love" - S. Paradjanov
overview: The author of the film decides to leave the country where she lives, in connection with the outbreak of the dramatic events, and return home to Armenia in search of a worthy example and solutions on how to live on. Paradjanov's house becomes a place of inspiration and a point of no return to toxic reality.
